name: French Silk Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate until smooth.
2. Allow it to cool completely.
3. Cream the butter until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating at medium speed until the mixture is light and airy.
5. Stir in the melted chocolate until well combined.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating 5 minutes after each addition.
7. Gently fold in the cool whip until just incorporated.
8. Spoon the filling into the prepared pastry shell.
9. Chill for about 2 hours.
10. Beat the whipping cream until foamy.
11. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until soft peaks form.
12. Spread the whipped cream over the pie and garnish with shaved chocolate.
